titleStmt.title: SII 9.277: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 277. (A.R. No. 555 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE VILLAGE MALAKAPURAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Śaka 1106, Krōdhi, Kārtika, amāvāsye, Sōmavāra, Sūrya-grahana corresponding to A.D. 1184 November 5, Monday when there was a solar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Trailōkyamalla Sōmēśvāradēva (IV) ruling from Jayantīpura and gives a genealogical account of the Brāhman warriors Daṇḍanāyaka Kaḷidāsa, his younger brother Lakshmīdēva, the former's son Bammidēva or Brahmadēva, his son Padmidēva and the latter's maternal uncle Vatsarāja. Padmidēvarasa and Vatsarāja were ruling the whole of the eastern country including Sindavāḍi. The village Kantarike in Bāgi twelve, a sub-division of Sindavāḍi thousand, was granted to the temple of Brahmesvaradēva at Kaṟekaṇṭhapura in Kīrtinārāyaṇapura, the capital of the Sindavāḍi province. The temple was built and consecrated by the Vaḍḍavyavahāri Śrōtriya-Māhēsvara Eṟeyamaseṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāreṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvalla
bha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya
kulatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatraiḷōkyamalla bhujabaḷavīra
sōmēśvaradēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravardhdhamā
namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ jayantīpurada nelavīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁ rājyageyuttuvire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷanvayameṁteṁdaḍe .
baḷavadvīracaḷukyabhūpasacivaṁ khyātaṁ hariścaṁdranujvaḷakīrttipriya
nātanagratanayaṁ śrīkāḷidāsaṁ pradhānalalāmaṁ tadanu prasūtanadhikaṁ śrīla
kṣmidēvaṁ mahītaḷamaṁ maṁtrabaḷapratāpabharadiṁ svāyattamaṁ māḍidaṁ .
Adaṭaṁ sādhitanurvvīśātravakuḷaṁ tatkāḷidāsaṁge puṭṭidanuṇmūḷita
durggavargganadhirājaprājyasāmrājyasaṁpadudanvattuhināṁśubāhubaḷabhī
maṁ maṁtrivaryyaṁ jagadviditaṁ tuṁbuḷa baṁmidēvanenipaṁ haṁsāṁganāvallabhaṁ .
besanaṁ rāyamurāri sōmamahipaṁ pēḷalbharaṁ geyyadeydi samagrājiyo
ḷallu mallanṛpanaṁ muṁkaṭṭidaṁ mattamormme samudrāvadhiyāge cōḷeya
nāḍaṁ sūṟegoṁḍātanaṁ masakaṁ guṁdisi vārdhiyaṁ pugisidaṁ śrībrahmadaṁḍādhipaṁ .
Ātana ta(ṁ)mmanatyadhikatējanumāramaṇāṁghripadmasaṁpūta manaskaniṁdravibhavaṁ
parirakṣitabhūmibhūsurabrātanakhaṁḍitācaritadānacayaṁ saphaḷīkṛtātmapu
ṇyātiśayaṁ virājisidanurvige caṁḍugidaṁḍanāyakaṁ . tuṁbuḷabammidēvarathi
nīpatigaṁ sujanapraṇūtahaṁsāṁbikegaṁ maṇōrathame puṭṭuvamāḷkeyino
ldu puṭṭi vaṁśāṁbaramaṁ prabhāvisidanapratimaprabaḷapratāpi vīrāṁbudhi padmi
dēvanene saṁdanamātya janaikabhūṣaṇaṁ . viḷasaṁnītiyutaṁ niyōganipuṇaṁ ta
tpadmidēvaṁge mātuḷanappaṁ vibhulakṣmidēvanaḷiyaṁ gaṁgāsatīvallabhaṁ . lalitakāri
jayāvatīpriyasutaṁ daṁḍādhināthaṁ mahītiḷakaṁ tānenaliṁtu peṁpuvaḍedaṁ
śrīvatsarājāhvayaṁ . svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnā
dhipati lāḷakhaṁḍeyakāṟaradhiṣṭāyakanaṇugasāhaṇādhipati mahāpra
caṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ bhujabaḷabhīmaṁ padmidēvarasaruṁ mahāpradhānaṁ vatsarājadaṁ
ḍanāyakaruṁ siṁdavāḍi sāsiraṁ modalāgi pūrvadiśābhāgamellamaṁ nijavī
ryyabhujabaḷadiṁ pratipāḷisuttamirddu śakavaruṣa 1106 neya krōdhisaṁ
vatsarada kārttikadamāvāsye sōmavāradaṁdu sūryyagrahaṇanimittamāgi
siṁdavāḍi sāsirada rājadhānipaṭṭaṇaṁ kīrttinārāyaṇapurada śrīsva
yaṁbhukaṟekaṇṭhadēvara puradoḷage mahāvaḍtavyavahāri śrōtriyamā
hēśvaraṁ Eṟeyamaseṭṭiyarmmāḍisida śrībrahmēśvaradēvargge Aṁgabhōga
raṁgabhōgakhaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnōdhdhārakkaṁ brāhmaṇabhōjanakkaṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁ
baraṁ salvantāgi siṁdavāḍi sāsirada kaṁpaṇaṁ bhāgi 12 ṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ kaṁtarike
yaṁba grāmamaṁ pūrvaprasiddhasīmāsamanvitamāgiyaṣṭabhōgatējasāmyasahi
tamāgi samastanidhinidhānajalapāṣāṇavṛkṣasamētamāgi sarvvakarabādhāvivarjji
tamāgi tribhōgābhyaṁtaraṁ sarvvanamasyamāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭar . sā
mānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvānētānbhā
vinaṟpārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . svadattāṁ para
dattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Idanāvaṁ pratipāḷipaṁ niyamadiṁdātaṁge satkīrti saṁpadamuṁ kalpaśatā
yuvuṁ ciraniṁ baṁdaiśvaryamuṁ śauryyamuṁ mudamuṁ saṁtativṛddhiyuṁ mahime
yuṁ nairōgyamuṁ bhāgyamuṁ paduḷaṁ śāśvatamāgi nilke vijayaṁ bhadraṁ śubhaṁ
maṁgaḷaṁ . śrīniḷayaṁ vivēki nagarāgraṇi vaiśyalalāmanuttamaṁ mānitagōtra
nīśvarapadāṁbujabhaktanudārayuktanuttānitatējanāśritajanāmarabhūruha
neṁdu santataṁ tānolaviṁde baṁṇipudu dhāriṇi Iṁteṟeyammaseṭṭiyaṁ .
Āvibhuviṁge puṭṭidanudāraguṇāṁbudhi hōciseṭṭi nānāvidhavastuvī
kṣaṇavicakṣaṇanakṣayapuṇyanabdhavēḷāvadhivarttikīrtti śubhamūrtti gurudvijadēvabhakta
tīvasudhātaḷāgradoḷadēṁ pesarvettano vaiśyamaṁḍanaṁ . Ātana tammaṁ
dirddharaṇītaḷa saṁsēvyareṇisidarnnayavinayōpētarmanōjanibhaśōbhātanuga
ḷpesariṁ . ©©
Digital edition of SII 9.277 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
